source_pr.title: planner, executor: set memory size to MAXUint64 for prepare plan cache test
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Set memory size to MAXUint64 for prepare plan cache test ### What is changed and how it works? The test for prepare plan cache is unstable caused by the machine memory utilization after #8339 . So I set the memory size to MAX_Uint64 to make the test result stable every time. ### Check List Tests - No code Code changes N/A Side effects N/A Related changes N/A --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8556)

symptoms: The test for prepare plan cache is unstable caused by the machine memory utilization after #8339 .
failure_signature: The test for prepare plan cache is unstable caused by the machine memory utilization after #8339 .
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Plan-cache/lease/background refresh can introduce timing-dependent behavior. This PR stabilizes it by: planner, executor: set memory size to MAXUint64 for prepare plan cache test.
fix_pattern: planner, executor: set memory size to MAXUint64 for prepare plan cache test

evidence: evidence: The test for prepare plan cache is unstable caused by the machine memory utilization after #8339 .
